title: Pozzums Mischeif
body:
![Title card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1bb4ad9566382e953b0b05c4466b6559936b86e.png)

# Pozzum's Mischeif
adds possums, found in abandoned villages, and tigas.
Possums are tamable with sweetberries and work similar to the minecraft dog, following around and attacking your attackers or whoever you attack.

Pozzum's Mischeif also adds Possum's magic mirror, an item that can be linked to a lodestone, when linked you hold the mirror in you're main hand and 2 enderpearls in you're offhand then rightclick to load it. the texture is made by Homak, a person i no longer associate with

### Possums:
possums now have their own inventory allowing them too pick stuff up, when tamed possums pick stuff up, you can shift rightclick them too pick them up and take items out of them just like a bundle.

## extra: 
if a possum is named Ego, Pozzums or Hstar they get a custom skin
